name: ReportRequest
description: Payload for reporting an email address as exhibiting malicious behavior.

tags.description: One or more tags classifying the malicious behavior.

description.description: Additional information and context about the activity.
description.example: Phishing email impersonating the CEO with a malicious attachment.

timestamp.description: Unix epoch seconds when the activity occurred. Defaults to now.

expires.description: Number of hours the reported email should be considered risky.
